signals.headline: US-Iran ceasefire talks collapse in Pakistan; Trump announces Navy blockade of Strait of Hormuz
signals.raw:
US-Iran ceasefire talks collapse in Pakistan; Trump announces Navy blockade of Strait of Hormuz.** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]

Talks ended without agreement on April 13, 2026, due to Iran's refusal to abandon nuclear ambitions, as stated by President Trump and VP JD Vance[1][2]. Trump confirmed the US Navy will block ships entering or leaving the Strait of Hormuz, calling Iran "extortion

signals.headline: South Korea Holds Interest Rate at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea Holds Interest Rate at 2.5% Amid Rising Inflation Pressures from Oil Prices and Iran Conflict | NO | HIGH confidence**[4][5]

The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board unanimously decided on April 10, 2026, to keep its benchmark rate unchanged at 2.5% for the seventh consecutive month, citing surging oil costs pushing consumer prices above the 2% target (recently at 2.2% in March 2026)
